questionHtml: Suggest the advantage in medical diagnosis of using ultrasound of frequency 1 MHz rather than 0.1 MHz.
markschemeHtml:
1 MHz waves have shorter wavelength than 0.1 MHz ✔

can probe smaller size areas of organs/have higher resolution ✔
